Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. TruffleRuby 172 upvotes, 22 comments
  2. TinyLoRA – Learning to Reason in 13 Parameters 217 upvotes, 39 comments
  3. MiniStack (replacement for LocalStack) 280 upvotes, 56 comments
  4. CERN levels up with new superconducting karts 291 upvotes, 62 comments
  5. Bring Back MiniDV with This Raspberry Pi FireWire Hat 98 upvotes, 17 comments
  6. Chess in SQL 131 upvotes, 26 comments
  7. 4D Doom 255 upvotes, 64 comments
  8. Tom Scott is back on YouTube [video] 17 upvotes, 1 comments
  9. A dot a day keeps the clutter away 450 upvotes, 133 comments
  10. Claude Code Unpacked : A visual guide 854 upvotes, 309 comments
  11. Ada and Spark on ARM Cortex-M – A Tutorial with Arduino and Nucleo Examples 14 upvotes, 1 comments
  12. Intuiting Pratt Parsing 94 upvotes, 26 comments
  13. Consider the Greenland Shark (2020) 45 upvotes, 10 comments
  14. The Claude Code Source Leak: fake tools, frustration regexes, undercover mode 1305 upvotes, 534 comments
  15. Show HN: 1-Bit Bonsai, the First Commercially Viable 1-Bit LLMs 342 upvotes, 134 comments
  16. Show HN: CLI to order groceries via reverse-engineered REWE API (Haskell) 162 upvotes, 61 comments
  17. Claude Wrote a Full FreeBSD Remote Kernel RCE with Root Shell (CVE-2026-4747) 162 upvotes, 61 comments
  18. Is BGP Safe Yet? No. Test Your ISP 135 upvotes, 52 comments
  19. OpenAI demand sinks on secondary market as Anthropic runs hot 97 upvotes, 37 comments
  20. Iran war sparks renewables boom as Europeans rush to buy solar, heat pumps, EVs 21 upvotes, 6 comments
  21. AI has suddenly become more useful to open-source developers 28 upvotes, 12 comments
  22. Neanderthals survived on a knife's edge for 350k years 208 upvotes, 157 comments
  23. New Patches Allow Building Linux IPv6-Only, Option to Deprecate "Legacy" IPv4 70 upvotes, 45 comments
  24. Show HN: Sycamore – next gen Rust web UI library using fine-grained reactivity 65 upvotes, 43 comments
  25. OnlyOffice kills Nextcloud partnership for forking its project without approval 35 upvotes, 22 comments
  26. Apple Removes iPhone Vibe Coding App from App Store 18 upvotes, 10 comments
  27. Show HN: Baton – A desktop app for developing with AI agents 52 upvotes, 41 comments
  28. I Quit. The Clankers Won 310 upvotes, 323 comments
  29. Slop is not necessarily the future 285 upvotes, 461 comments
  30. Wasmer (YC S19) Is Hiring – Rust and DevRel Positions 0 upvotes, 0 comments
